calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records, And Or Alternatively To Modify The Subpoenas, And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STACY HYEOK KANG, ESQ. of Rencher Law Group, P.C., Tel No. 415-877-4486 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JENNIFER CRUTCHFIELD, ESQ. of Philip M. Anderson & Associates, Tel No. 925-225-6838 appearing for the Defendant Elayne L. Blair.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at the hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF XACIL VAZQUEZ'S Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records, And Or Alternatively To Modify The Subpoenas, And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs is granted. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
